Bucket 1A quasi-treasury gross-up: external = ISS / (1 - 3776844/40534000) = ISS * 1.10275. Yahoo back-scales all historical dividends 2014-2022 using post-June-2021 buyback free-float. Verified ratio 1.102751 across 18 records (stdev ~3e-8). Sources: interfax.ru/russia/783921, quote.rbc.ru/news/short_article/61151ec59a7947f286100890, dohod.ru/ik/analytics/dividend/akrn.

Bucket 1B capital-reduction mis-class: external = ISS * 158245476/152863397 = ISS * 1.035208. Yahoo back-scales pre-cancellation dividends (2013-2020) using post-2022 share count after Nornickel cancelled 4,590,852 (2021-10-06) + 791,227 (2022) treasury shares. Verified ratio across 16 records (stdev ~5e-7). Sources: ar2021.nornickel.ru/shareholders/share-capital, forbes.ru/news/243434, dohod.ru/ik/analytics/dividend/gmkn.

Bucket 1F: Yahoo applies wrong factor 7/8=0.875 to all pre-2024-12 dividends. Actual 2024 bonus was 7-for-1 (total shares 8x), correct back-adjust = 1/8 not 7/8. ISS canonical confirmed via dohod + smart-lab on 4 spot-checks (32/90/400/225 RUB). Source: smart-lab.ru/blog/news/1023444.php.

Bucket 1B: Yahoo back-adjusts pre-2022 dividends by 1/(1-0.025)=1.02564 due to ~2.5% Raspadskaya treasury cancellation post Evraz minority buyback. ISS canonical confirmed via dohod + smart-lab on 4 spot-checks. Sources: spglobal.com (Evraz/Raspadskaya), evraz.com shareholder manual.

Bucket 1C: Yahoo TERP back-adjust factor ~0.8158 for all pre-Oct-2020 dividends, triggered by Aeroflot Oct-2020 SPO (1.334bn new shares at 60 RUB vs ~73.5 RUB market). ISS canonical (as-paid) confirmed via dohod + smart-lab on 4 spot-checks. Sources: cbonds.com/stocks/RU0009062285, ir.aeroflot.com/en/news-detail/article/57672.

Bucket 1E: tbank rounds Sovcombank per-share amounts to 2 decimals; ISS stores full precision (e.g. 0.262531 vs tbank 0.25). Non-constant ratios 0.90-0.98 rule out simple split-factor. ISS canonical confirmed via dohod + smart-lab. Source: dohod.ru/ik/analytics/dividend/svcb.
